```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Select and configure the best ML model for a given task"
---
# Model Selection
## Task
Select and configure the optimal ML model for the task.
## Requirements
1. Analyze task type (classification, regression, generation, embedding). 2. Compare candidate models by accuracy, latency, and cost.
3. Consider model size constraints (memory, inference time). 4. Evaluate pre-trained vs fine-tuned options.
5. Document selection rationale and benchmarks.
## Constraints
- Prefer smaller models meeting accuracy requirements. Consider Aria provider order for inference.
## Success Criteria
- Best model selected with rationale. Benchmarks documented. Resource constraints met.
```
